ok



*From:* Tan Jing Ning Jynnice <jynnice.tanjn@shopee.com>
*Sent:* Monday, 8 September 2025 3:34 pm
*To:* Ian Ho <hoi@sea.com>
*Cc:* Abigail Low Xue Li <abigail.lowxl@shopee.com>; Anh Le Dieu <
anh.ledieu@shopee.com>; Emily Lin <emily.lin@shopee.com>; Wanlu Li <
liwl@sea.com>; Alice,THU HONG NGUYEN <nguyena@sea.com>; Van Tsai <
van.tsaimh@shopee.com>; Shuning Wang <shuning.wang@shopee.com>
*Subject:* [Ian Approval Needed] Jesper Fong | Regional Cross Border, BPM
Team - Corporate, FTE - Associate, Product Management



Hi Ian,



As aligned with Shuning and C&B, we would like to seek your approval for
the following offer, based on the proposal below, this is considered a
Normal Offer:

We would like to propose SGD 4800 - 5000 (at P12 - P24 of associate salary
band) monthly according to Shopee's new Fresh Grad pay range
similar rank/role

Singaporean, Singapore Citizen

Careersite

Sep 2025

NA


*Interview Feedback:*
*Ren Jiahui, A*

+ He can clearly communicate his past experience, provide background on the
company he is in, the team he is in, the projects/product features he
delivered; His communication is also structured, little prompt is needed
from me.
+ When asked about his exact involvement, he gave honest feedback about the
work split between himself and his supervisor
+ When asked about what to consider to allow MY local seller to sell to PH,
he can provide a comprehensive list of check points, showcasing he has done
research or learned from previous interview with Eveline
+ Can start immediately
= When explained to him that CB BPM needs to handle live bugs, which is
different from traditional PM roles that he experienced through internship,
did not sense concern from him
= When asked about stressful time, he mentioned about about having to rush
through and deliver UAT in 2 days, which require some form of OT. But, i
did not sense any complaint on that.



*Eveline Seah, A*

(+) End-to-End Product Lifecycle Experience: Jesper has proven, hands-on
experience in managing the entire product lifecycle from his time at Ant
International. He led a second project more independently, which is a
significant strength. His involvement in requirement gathering, writing
PRDs, collaborating with dev team, and finding and fixing bugs demonstrates
a comprehensive understanding of the role.
(+) Strong Problem-Solving and Technical Aptitude: His background in
Business Analytics is a major asset. He showed a clear, logical approach to
problem-solving by identifying a bug, checking his own work (test cases,
PRD), and then confirming with the dev team. His ability to simplify
complex systems is a valuable skill for a BPM.
(+) Relevant Industry Experience and Communication: His internship at Ant
International, a fintech company, provides him with relevant experience in
a regulated environment that deals with a wide array of users and financial
products. His experience in translating PRDs to Mandarin Chinese and his
communication with the Shenzhen development team is a direct match for the
bilingual requirement of the CB BPM role.
(-) Lack of E-commerce Domain Expertise: His primary experience is in
fintech and enterprise software. While he mentioned being an avid Shopee
user, his answers did not demonstrate a deep understanding of the specific
complexities of cross-border e-commerce, such as logistics, operations, or
the intricacies of different markets. This is expected from his lack of
experience in e-commerce.
(-) Guidance-Oriented Mindset: While Jesper strives for independence, he is
used to seeking guidance from his supervisor. While this is expected of an
intern, it may signal that he is not a "self-starter" to the level required
in a dynamic, high-growth environment where a high degree of autonomy is
expected. However, he is able to identify areas of improvements under
guidance from his supervisor
(=) Jesper is a highly promising candidate with a solid technical
background and a strong track record of hands-on product management work.
He has a better grasp of the full product lifecycle than the other two
candidates and his experience with an international, cross-functional team
makes him an excellent fit for the role's collaborative nature.
(?) Autonomy in Decision Making: I would probe further into how he would
handle a task with a vague mandate where he has to define the problem and
the solution with minimal guidance.
(?) Interest in Cross-Border: While he expressed a general interest in
e-commerce, it would be important to validate his specific motivation for
the cross-border side of the business and why he believes he can contribute
meaningfully.

Thank you!

--

Best regards,

*Tan Jing Ning Jynnice*

Shopee *| *People Team *|* Recruitment

Address: 1 Fusionopolis Place, Galaxis, Singapore 138522

Get Behind-the-scenes with the Shopee PM team here
<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7aVqc-Xs9WY&t=2s>.
